references.key: each trace step is processed by an llm to extract a page schema and identify the high level action performed
references.raw: Extract. Each trace step is processed by an LLM to extract a page schema and identify the high-level action performed. The page schema defines the actionable elements on each page (Section I, Prompt 3).
references.title: Each trace step is processed by an LLM to extract a page schema and identify the high-level action performed

references.title: Each trace step is mapped to a page schema element, producing (element, latency) observations
